videoDirection.paletteTypeSource: Quiet technical product explainer: light canvas, ink structure, D3-generated links/bars/arcs, teal request token, blue/green proof, coral fallback, yellow decision accents.
videoDirection.safeZones: Keep all critical text inside 80px margins and above the bottom 108px caption-safe band.
videoDirection.captionPolicy: No captions in this style test, but bottom band remains clear.
videoDirection.rhythm: Four 3-second scenes with visible entrance, development, and settle phases.
negativeList: No repeated background sweep across all scenes

scenes.title: Unclear cache policy impact
scenes.viewerTask: Read one unresolved issue while seeing the system context.
scenes.choiceRationale: The hook needs one dominant problem card and a secondary service network that makes the unknown cache policy feel contextual instead of decorative.

roles.supporting: D3 force-network service graph and request route

scenes.layout: Context left, problem card upper-right, clear caption band
scenes.hierarchy: Large problem card first, request stream second

motionPhases.name: entrance
motionPhases.visualChange: D3 network links and system nodes resolve

motionPhases.name: development
motionPhases.visualChange: Request token approaches the unresolved card

motionPhases.name: settle
motionPhases.visualChange: Question mark pulses once and holds

scenes.rendererHandoff: Anime.js-ready preview; deterministic frame renderer controls final export.
validationChecks: Problem card is the largest object

scenes.title: Cache lookup branch
scenes.viewerTask: Trace one request into hit or origin fallback.
scenes.choiceRationale: The viewer needs a shared lookup spine that visibly splits into cache hit and origin fallback outcomes.
scenes.layout: Cache lane left, origin lane right, decision point top center
scenes.hierarchy: Moving request token first, lane outcomes second
scenes.safeZones: Lane labels stay above caption-safe band

motionPhases.name: development
motionPhases.visualChange: Token branches to cache and origin lanes

scenes.rendererHandoff: Use Anime.js for live branch preview if needed; final capture uses timestamp state.
validationChecks: Path distinction is visible without explanatory paragraph

scenes.title: Before/after proof
scenes.viewerTask: Compare before/after diff and see metric improvement.
scenes.compositionChoice: Golden Or Root Split / Before-After Bars
scenes.choiceRationale: The before/after diff is the dominant proof while metrics stay subordinate in a stable rail; D3 scales keep the proof proportional.
scenes.layout: Metric rail left, proof panel right
scenes.hierarchy: Diff panel first, 37 ms and cache hit rate second
scenes.rendererHandoff: Anime.js may animate metric reveals in implementation; final export is deterministic.

scenes.title: Rollout checklist CTA
scenes.choiceRationale: A final CTA needs immediate clarity, while the radial checklist turns the held final beat into a semantic completion structure.
scenes.layout: CTA in upper-middle, checklist ticks below, bottom band clear
scenes.rendererHandoff: Anime.js-ready close state with deterministic timestamp rendering.
validationChecks: The held final frame is stable
